scenario: Patient is married and is a nonsmoker and lives with his wife
patient_utterances: [Clinician asked: "Okay, let me ask you few questions."] Sure.
[Clinician asked: "Are you married?"] Yes I am.
[Clinician asked: "So, you live with your wife, sir?"] Yes, that's right.
[Clinician asked: "And do you smoke?"] No I don't.
[Clinician asked: "I think the nurse had already asked you some of these questions, so I would just agree with them all. I don't need to ask again."] Sure, thanks.

gold_sections.FAM_SOCHX: Patient is married and is a nonsmoker and lives with his wife.   Nursing notes were reviewed with which I agree.

naive.response_text: Thank you for your answers. I know some questions might seem repetitive, but they help me better understand your health. If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to ask. I'm here to help and support you.

strong_prompt.response_text:
Thank you for answering all my questions so promptly. I can understand that going through the same questions again might feel a bit repetitive, and I appreciate your patience with the process. Your time is valuable, and I want to make sure we focus on what’s most important for your care.

Let’s work together to address any concerns you might have. If there’s something specific bothering you or any symptoms you’re experiencing, please feel free to share. We can explore those together and make sure we’re covering everything that’s important for your health.

Before we wrap up, could you summarize in your own words what we’ve discussed today? That way, I can ensure I’ve covered everything clearly and we’re both on the same page. We’ll schedule a follow-up in two weeks to check on your progress and adjust our plan as needed.

framework_only.response_text:
Thank you for sharing your information with me.

Let's plan to see each other again soon. In the meantime, if you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out.

structured_response.acknowledgment: Thank you for sharing your information with me.
structured_response.follow_up_invitation: Let's plan to see each other again soon. In the meantime, if you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out.

retrieval_only.response_text:
Thank you for reaching out. It sounds like you're looking for some support and information regarding your health concerns.

I want to make sure I explained this clearly — can you tell me, in your own words, what we're going to do next and why?

Let's plan to see each other again in 4 weeks. In the meantime, if you have any new concerns or questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

structured_response.acknowledgment: Thank you for reaching out. It sounds like you're looking for some support and information regarding your health concerns.
structured_response.teach_back_prompt: I want to make sure I explained this clearly — can you tell me, in your own words, what we're going to do next and why?
structured_response.follow_up_invitation: Let's plan to see each other again in 4 weeks. In the meantime, if you have any new concerns or questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

full.response_text:
Thank you for reaching out. It sounds like you're looking for some support and information regarding your concerns.

I want to make sure I explained this clearly — can you tell me, in your own words, what we're going to do next and why?

Let's plan to see each other again in a week. If anything changes or if you have more questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.
